name: Taco Hotdish
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush taco chips and place in lightly-oiled 9x13-inch pan.
2. Brown hamburger and onion, draining excess fat.
3. Add tomato soup and taco seasoning to the meat mixture.
4. Mix everything together and pour over the crushed chips.
5. Spread cottage cheese evenly over the top of the mixture.
6. Sprinkle cheddar cheese on the dish.
7. Cover with foil and bake at 350°F for 40 minutes.
8. Serve with shredded lettuce and chopped tomatoes added on top.
